MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER MBNA AMERICAN BANK, N.A.'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITATION AWARD: GRANTED. Arbitration award of $9,416.88.
